reasoning: Tajima Beef appears as item #1 with official MAFF GI description; Kobe Beef follows as #2 providing excellent context for the Tajima→Kobe relationship. All 11 items are officially registered GIs. Translation quality is high with confidence:high metadata.

reasoning: Identical data to L1-01 but delivered in Arabic. Translations for Tajima Beef and Kobe Beef descriptions are accurate and fluent. GI metadata preserved. Arabic script is correct right-to-left. Response equips an Arabic-language agent well.

improvement_hint: Transliterate product names consistently; 'ساو موتشي دايزو' is a phonetic transliteration without a semantic translation — consider adding a brief Arabic semantic description.
